issues.detail: Missing error handling and edge case coverage in examples.

scenarios.name: Build a stock analysis agent that uses pandas and matplotlib
scenarios.rationale: Treatment imports CodeAgent and a model class from smolagents, decorates Python functions with @tool with typed signatures and docstrings, and passes additional_authorized_imports=['pandas','numpy','matplotlib'] plus max_steps, all per the skill; baseline reaches for LangChain/AutoGPT-style tool-calling and never uses smolagents' code-execution model.

scenarios.name: Compose a manager agent that delegates to a web researcher and a data analyst
scenarios.rationale: Treatment wraps two CodeAgent specialists in ManagedAgent with name and description fields and passes them via managed_agents= to a manager CodeAgent, exactly as the skill prescribes; baseline writes ad-hoc Python orchestration without the ManagedAgent abstraction.
